snippet.sync_client:
from seed import SeedApi

client = SeedApi()
client.get_users()
snippet.async_client:
import asyncio

from seed import AsyncSeedApi

client = AsyncSeedApi()


async def main() -> None:
    await client.get_users()


asyncio.run(main())

snippet.sync_client:
from seed import SeedApi

client = SeedApi()
client.get_user(
    user_id="userId",
)
snippet.async_client:
import asyncio

from seed import AsyncSeedApi

client = AsyncSeedApi()


async def main() -> None:
    await client.get_user(
        user_id="userId",
    )


asyncio.run(main())

snippet.sync_client:
from seed import SeedApi

client = SeedApi()
client.get_token(
    client_id="client_id",
    client_secret="client_secret",
)
snippet.async_client:
import asyncio

from seed import AsyncSeedApi

client = AsyncSeedApi()


async def main() -> None:
    await client.get_token(
        client_id="client_id",
        client_secret="client_secret",
    )


asyncio.run(main())
